title: Between Two Kingdoms
author: Suleika Jaouad
subline: A memoir of life interrupted — and the long road back.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A horizontal hairline divides the cover in two — 'Kingdom I' above (life before cancer) and 'Kingdom II' below (life after). A single person silhouette stands ON the seam, straddling both. The seam itself is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(0 0)" fill="none">
    <!-- Labels for each kingdom -->
    <text x="126" y="900" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.3em">I · BEFORE</text>
    <text x="1474" y="1600" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.3em">II · AFTER</text>
    <!-- The red seam (1px) -->
    <line x1="0" y1="1200" x2="1600" y2="1200" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- Above the seam: a sparse 'sky' of fine lines representing the before-life -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5">
      <line x1="200" y1="400" x2="500" y2="380"/>
      <line x1="700" y1="500" x2="1000" y2="480"/>
      <line x1="1100" y1="600" x2="1400" y2="580"/>
      <line x1="300" y1="700" x2="700" y2="680"/>
      <line x1="900" y1="800" x2="1300" y2="780"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Below the seam: a denser 'ground' — vertical hairlines representing the after-life -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.5">
      <line x1="200" y1="1300" x2="200" y2="1500"/>
      <line x1="350" y1="1300" x2="350" y2="1500"/>
      <line x1="500" y1="1300" x2="500" y2="1500"/>
      <line x1="650" y1="1300" x2="650" y2="1500"/>
      <line x1="800" y1="1300" x2="800" y2="1500"/>
      <line x1="950" y1="1300" x2="950" y2="1500"/>
      <line x1="1100" y1="1300" x2="1100" y2="1500"/>
      <line x1="1250" y1="1300" x2="1250" y2="1500"/>
      <line x1="1400" y1="1300" x2="1400" y2="1500"/>
      <line x1="200" y1="1600" x2="200" y2="1800"/>
      <line x1="500" y1="1600" x2="500" y2="1800"/>
      <line x1="800" y1="1600" x2="800" y2="1800"/>
      <line x1="1100" y1="1600" x2="1100" y2="1800"/>
      <line x1="1400" y1="1600" x2="1400" y2="1800"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The person silhouette standing ON the seam, straddling both -->
    <g transform="translate(800 1080)" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="3.5" fill="none">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-60" r="24"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-36" x2="0" y2="120"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="-40" y2="40"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-10" x2="40" y2="40"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="120" x2="-26" y2="170"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="120" x2="26" y2="170"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A small red dot on the figure's heart -->
    <circle cx="800" cy="1130" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The book is a literal memoir of two kingdoms. The cover is divided in half by a RED 1.5px horizontal seam at center. Above the seam: a sparse field of horizontal hairlines (the structured 'before' life). Below the seam: a denser field of vertical hairlines (the 'after' life, the long road back). A white stick-figure stands ON the seam, straddling both kingdoms, with a red dot at the heart. Title sits in the middle, weight 300 whisper, mixed-case. Brand 'JAOUAD' in the bottom-right; pill 'I → II' at the bottom — the kingdom transition.
